name: Elon Musk
description: CEO of Tesla and SpaceX, pioneering electric vehicles and commercial space travel.

name: Steve Jobs
description: Co-founder of Apple Inc., pioneer of the personal computer revolution.

name: Albert Einstein
description: Theoretical physicist who developed the theory of relativity and shaped modern physics.

name: Marie Curie
description: Physicist and chemist who pioneered research on radioactivity, double Nobel laureate.

name: Taylor Swift
description: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter known for narrative songwriting and genre-blending albums.

name: Oprah Winfrey
description: Media mogul, television host, actress, and philanthropist.

name: Beyoncé
description: Global music icon, lead singer of Destiny's Child and solo superstar.

name: Bill Gates
description: Co-founder of Microsoft, leading software pioneer and philanthropist.

name: Michael Jordan
description: Six-time NBA champion, widely regarded as the greatest basketball player ever.

name: Nikola Tesla
description: Inventor and electrical engineer, father of AC power systems and wireless communication.
